details.explanation: He pays close attention to what clients say and how they say it, then adjusts his work accordingly. details.explanation: His work is clearly built around helping others feel better, not just completing sessions. He consistently prioritizes comfort, calm, and a respectful atmosphere, especially for stressed or hurting clients. This is one of his strongest and most visible operational traits.

details.explanation: He can teach clients a few useful home stretches in a clear, low-pressure way. His instruction style seems hands-on and practical rather than formal or elaborate. He is likely strongest when showing something directly instead of giving long explanations.

details.explanation: He weighs symptoms, context, and risk before deciding what to do next. The referral when numbness worsened shows he does not force a massage-only solution when the problem looks medical. His thinking appears steady and sensible rather than flashy or overly theoretical.

details.explanation: He seems able to diagnose the likely source of tension from posture, breathing, and reported symptoms. He notices when a session needs to slow down or when a complaint suggests something beyond routine muscle tightness. This is a practical diagnostic skill rooted in experience.
